data.title: SunOpta Announces Receipt of Final Court Approval and Competition Act Clearance Related to Proposed Acquisition by Refresco
data.description: SunOpta Inc. has recently received final approval from the Ontario Superior Court of Justice for its acquisition by Refresco Holding B.V. for US$6.50 per share in cash. SunOpta, a North American supply chain solutions provider, announced the approval of the proposed acquisition, which was confirmed on April 20, 2026. This acquisition marks a significant move for SunOpta as it continues to strengthen its position in the market.

data.title: BIO-key warned by Nasdaq for delayed Form 10-K filing, faces non-compliance.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.2%, marking an increase of 1.5% from the previous quarter. The number of job losses amounted to over 300,000, with the biggest impact seen in the manufacturing and construction sectors. Additionally, the youth unemployment rate has reached a record high of 20.1%. Experts attribute this surge in joblessness to the ongoing economic downturn and the effects of the global pandemic. The government has announced plans to provide support and training programs to help those affected by the unemployment crisis.

data.title: Sight Sciences Announces the Release of its Sustainability Report
data.description: The recently released Sustainability Report covers the period from 2023 to 2025 and details the Company's efforts in the areas of environment, society, and governance. The report includes important data reflecting the company's performance and achievements in these three key areas over the three-year period. The information presented can help stakeholders assess the company's sustainability practices and initiatives during this time frame.

data.title: Fulton Financial Corporation Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Lancaster, Pennsylvania, on April 22, 2026, Fulton Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: FULT) disclosed that their net income accessible to common shareholders for the initial quarter of 2026 was $92.2 million, equivalent to $0.51 per diluted share. This marks a $4.2 million decline compared to the prior period.

data.title: First Industrial Realty Trust Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, there was a significant increase in Cash Same Store Net Operating Income (NOI) by 8.7%. Additionally, Cash Rental Rates experienced a substantial boost of 32%. Notably, there was a remarkable 41% surge in Cash Rental Rates for leases beginning in 2026. This increase covers various agreements, including a notable 556,000 square feet renewal in the Inland Empire. An agreement was also reached with a third-party logistics (3PL) tenant on the credit watchlist. It is worth noting that roughly 60% of the outstanding balance owed was collected during this period.

data.title: Achieve boosts HELOC loan limit to $500,000 with APRs as low as 5.875%
data.description: Achieve, a leading digital personal finance company based in San Mateo, California, is poised for significant growth in Home Equity Line of Credit (HELOC) offerings. The company has announced larger loan amounts, lower interest rates, and an expansion into 31 states, covering almost 80% of the U.S. population. These strategic moves are expected to fuel Achieve's continued success in the HELOC market.

data.title: ServiceNow Stock Tumbles On Q1 Earnings, Company Flags Delayed Deals Due To Middle East Conflict
data.description: ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE: NOW) released its first-quarter financial results after markets closed on Wednesday. The company reported approximately $3.77 billion in revenue for the quarter, surpassing the consensus estimate of $3.74 billion. Adjusted earnings were reported at 97 cents per share, slightly exceeding analyst predictions of 96 cents per share. Total revenue witnessed a 22% year-over-year increase, with Subscription revenue experiencing a similar rise. ServiceNow disclosed that it held remaining performance obligations of $27.7 billion at the end of the quarter, reflecting a 25% increase from the previous year. Customer spending over $1 million in annual contract value for Now Assist grew by 130% year-over-year. The company expressed optimism about leveraging its two decades of engineering expertise amid the opportunities and risks presented by new technologies. The full story is available on the source's website.

data.title: Kevin M. Warsh aims to shake off criticism as Trump’s Fed pick; strives to assure no interest rate cuts to please Trump.
data.description: During his confirmation hearing to become the head of the Federal Reserve, Kevin M. Warsh attempted to alleviate worries that he might lower interest rates to appease President Trump.

data.title: Banking group requests extra 60 days to review US stablecoin bill post OCC rulemaking completion.
data.description: A recent communication sent to four US government agencies stated that banks are requesting an additional 60 days to provide comments following the finalization of the OCC stablecoin rulemaking.

data.title: IBM Shares Drop Despite Q1 Earnings Beat: Details
data.description: IBM (NYSE: IBM) released its first-quarter results, surpassing Street expectations both in revenue and earnings. The company reported earnings of $1.91 per share, exceeding analyst forecasts of $1.81 by 5.52%. Quarterly revenue stood at $15.92 billion, beating the consensus estimate of $15.62 billion and showing an increase from $14.54 billion in the same period last year. Highlights from the report include overall revenue reaching $15.9 billion, representing a 9% rise (6% at constant currency rates), software revenue increasing by 11% (8% at constant currency), and consulting revenue also displaying positive growth. For more on this, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Xiaomi surprises with MiMo 2.5 Pro AI: A groundbreaking model with vision and audio abilities, at half the cost!
data.description: Xiaomi has revealed a new model in the MiMo-V2-Pro series just five weeks after its launch, which has caused a stir in the AI industry. The latest model comes equipped with visual and auditory capabilities and is being offered at a significantly reduced price compared to its predecessor, being available at just half the cost.

data.title: Bessent Defends Trump's Iran War Move Saying US Economy Was In 'Good Shape'— But Warns Growth May Be Slower This Quarter
data.description: In a recent interview, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent expressed concerns regarding the impact of the U.S.-Iran conflict on economic growth for the current quarter. Bessent indicated that the growth might be slower than previously expected due to the ongoing war. He highlighted the strong state of the economy prior to the conflict, attributing President Donald Trump's decision to go to war to positive economic indicators. Bessent's assessment was based on analyzing "micro data points" from various companies and banks rather than making precise GDP forecasts. He referenced JP Morgan Chase (NYSE: JPM) CEO Jamie Dimon's remarks on consumer credit and highlighted corporate earnings as evidence that consumers and businesses are still resilient. When questioned about predicting GDP, Bessent emphasized that it would depend on the duration of the conflict, which remains uncertain. He mentioned that the prediction would be influenced by how long the conflict lasts, whether it's "three days or three weeks."
